hero.title: Join Mōchirīī
hero.intro: Mōchirīī is a guild home for players who enjoy good company & pretty greetings. Optional Discord, always welcome.

steps.title: The Joining Path
intro: These steps carry you from hello to first run. Leaders handle setup; you bring your in-game name, time zone & patience while roles are assigned.

items.title: Enter the Hall
items.description: Join Discord & tell a mod you are here for the guild. Verification opens the server & the game channels appear once your role is set. If you feel stuck, DM a mod or ask in game; one greeting can open the door.

items.title: Read the Tome & Ranks
items.description: Skim the Tome & Ranks pages so you know our tone, etiquette, leadership path & support flow before you settle in.

items.title: Share your IGN & time zone
items.description: Post your in-game name & time zone so leaders can match you with channels, roles & event windows. Mōchirīī is global, so time zones help everyone avoid guesswork.

items.title: Receive your starting rank
items.description: A leader gives your starting rank & points you to the channels, roles & weekly notes you need first.

items.title: Join an event
items.description: Pick an upcoming event, RSVP if planning is needed & show up when you can. Ask questions early so the run starts well & everyone can share the road.

checklist.title: New Cupcake Checklist
checklist.intro: A quick way to step in ready to be welcomed.

items.title: Join the Discord
items.text: Use Discord for announcements, event planning & the having fun.
items.label: Open Discord

items.title: Know your in-game name or UID
items.text: Let us know your IGN so we can find you quickly & welcome you by name.

items.title: Read the Tome
items.text: Review the guild's conduct, values & expectations before you settle in.
items.label: Read the Tome

items.title: Check event expectations
items.text: Events are announced as scheduled. Join when you can, speak up when life gets busy & keep the atmosphere friendly.
items.label: View Events

items.title: Say hello
items.text: A simple greeting helps everyone recognize you; small welcomes become the start of shared runs.

culture.title: Expectations & Culture
intro: Mōchirīī stays kind through courtesy, effort & clear communication. Skill grows over time; care can show up in the first message.

cards.title: Respect & kindness
cards.description: Keep chat welcoming, assume good intent & treat every member as someone you may share the road with for a long time.

cards.title: Activity rhythm
cards.description: Participation stays flexible. Presence, RSVPs for planned runs & notice during breaks matter more than marathon sessions.

cards.title: Helping new members
cards.description: Questions belong here. Veterans share tips, builds & mechanics with patience. Leaders step in when guidance helps.

cards.title: Events & updates
cards.description: Events & announcements live in Discord as well as on the website, with pinned notes for clarity. RSVP early when asked & follow posted requirements.

notes.title: Notes
body: Voice chat is optional unless an event post says otherwise. Discord is the clearest place for roles, announcements & coordination.
Need a break? Tell a leader before a longer Cupcake nap so roles & expectations remain for you.
If you feel lost, tag a leader. Getting unstuck keeps the game fun.
